description: Materialize hod-doc's head-accountability PositionResponsibility atom on every kind=leader Position (DEC-55), so a leader Position carries its division's responsibilities and the US-LLM-27 spec-07 abort is closed. A seed migration mirroring the 0048/0050 pattern (idempotent, reversible); statement = hod-doc's wording generalized to the division ('Be accountable for delivering the division's responsibility atoms'). No model/grounding/parser/spec change (the position-atom path already emits + admits). Addresses FGAP-046; enacts DEC-55.
acceptance_criteria: Every kind=leader Position carries a stored position-grain PositionResponsibility atom expressing that the seat is accountable for delivering its division's responsibilities -- a real materialized row, not a string computed at grounding time.
The atom appears in the grounding responsibility inventory under its position, and the propose-responsibilities parser admits a position-grain citation of it without rejection.
A full workshop generation that attributes a leader-position's accountability for its division's responsibilities to that position completes without the spec-07 catalogue-gate abort.
The seed is idempotent (re-running it changes nothing) and reversible (the unseed removes exactly the rows it added); pre-existing position atoms are unchanged.
The project gate stays green (manage.py check, ruff, mypy, pytest, make test-js) and existing seeds, positions, and atoms are unaffected.
